findings.title: Sub-optimal Navigation Font Size
findings.evidence: text-[11px] used in Header.tsx navigation links.
findings.impact: Reduced readability for users with low vision or on non-high-DPI screens.
findings.fix: Increase font size to text-[12px] or text-[13px].
findings.acceptance_check: Nav links font-size is at least 12px.

findings.title: Light Theme Navigation Contrast
findings.evidence: text-on-surface-variant on white surface in light mode.
findings.impact: Potential WCAG contrast violation for active navigation elements.
findings.fix: Use a darker slate color for default nav text in light mode.
findings.acceptance_check: Contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for nav text.

recommendations.action: Increase nav items font size to 12px.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Improved legibility without compromising the industrial aesthetic.

recommendations.action: Audit contrast ratios for all small UI elements in light mode.
